positive_theme: standout pasta and the feeling of being looked after at the table
positive_verbatim_quote: Love the spaghetti bolognese and meatballs. Outstanding!
verbatim_excerpts: "I spent 40 minutes there with my wife and couldn’t even get served a glass of wine. The hostess was incredibly disorganized and inefficient." || "The woman there seemed irritated at that. She ended up serving us. We are a very polite family. She seemed very disinterested in our experience. She was unpleasant the entire time up until we paid our bill."

positive_theme: a reliable neighborhood bar you can return to mid week
positive_verbatim_quote: Beer and food were great and the bar staff were friendly, welcoming and helpful. Went twice when I stayed there for a week on business.
verbatim_excerpts: "This used to be one of my favorite places in Olde Town, but the food has disappointed the last few times we went. Burgers were overcooked and very dry. Tots were cold."
